Package org.batfish

package org.batfish
BDD-based symbolic primitives adapted for MCP network-policy reasoning.

This package provides low-level binary decision diagram abstractions used by MCP symbolic execution and domain encoding:

  • BDDInteger / MutableBDDInteger: bit-vector integer encoding on BDD variables
  • BDDDomain: finite-domain wrapper over BDD integer encodings
  • BDDUtils: utility helpers for factory setup, bit vectors, and variable pairing

These components are used as a backend foundation for fast symbolic set operations and satisfiability-driven reasoning.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.batfish.datamodel
    Lightweight IPv4 data model types used by symbolic encodings.

    Class that wraps a BDDInteger around a finite collection of values and provides an API for dealing directly with the values.
